name: Yousef Al-Saud
whatsapp_message: السلام عليكم يوسف 👋 لاحظنا أنك واجهت صعوبة في الاختبار الأخير (27/100)، لكن حضورك المميز يدل على التزامك وإصرارك 💪 عندنا 6 أيام قبل الاختبار القادم، خلينا نشتغل معاً على المواضيع الصعبة ونجهزك بشكل أفضل.
action: Schedule an immediate 1-on-1 support session with Yousef today to diagnose his quiz failure points and create a focused 6-day study plan for remediation.
reasoning: Yousef has been out of contact for 11 days and is facing a critical quiz performance gap (27/100) despite perfect attendance, indicating motivation but knowledge gaps. With only 6 days until the next assessment, urgent intervention is needed to prevent further failure and potential dropout from the remedial track.
